visualizations.title: Cotes' Near-Miss & Euler's Identity → Neural Networks
visualizations.description: Interactive visualization of how Cotes nearly reached Euler's formula, and why complex exponentials, rotations, and sinusoids still sit inside modern neural networks and transformers.

visualizations.title: INTELLECT-1 & INTELLECT-2 — Decentralized Training
visualizations.description: How INTELLECT-1 and INTELLECT-2 train frontier models across globally distributed GPU swarms using DiLoCo and async GRPO, slashing bandwidth 400x.

visualizations.title: KVQuant: KV Cache Quantization for Long-Context LLMs
visualizations.description: Interactive visualization of KVQuant — per-channel key quantization, pre-RoPE storage, non-uniform quantization, and dense-and-sparse decomposition for 10M context on 8×A100.

visualizations.title: PTP: Resolving the Independence Flaw
visualizations.description: Interactive deep dive into Parallel Token Prediction (PTP) — how normalizing flows fix the independence flaw in multi-token prediction.

visualizations.title: Weight Decay ≠ L2 Regularization
visualizations.description: Interactive visualization explaining why weight decay and L2 regularization diverge with Adam, and how AdamW fixes it.

visualizations.title: Musk Projection Reality Check — Dwarkesh Podcast Feb 2026
visualizations.description: Every major claim from Elon Musk on the Dwarkesh Podcast stress-tested with a 0-100 reality score.
